title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is unresponsive.

title: Login Error After Password Reset
description: User receives an error message when trying to log in after resetting the password.

title: Payment Declined but Charged
description: Customers card was charged even though the payment was marked as declined.

title: Account Suspended Unexpectedly
description: User account was suspended without prior notification or explanation.

title: Shipping Address Not Updating
description: Customer cannot update their shipping address from account settings.

title: App Crashes on Launch
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after opening.

title: Discount Code Not Working
description: Promo code shows invalid during checkout despite being active.

title: Profile Picture Upload Fails
description: User receives an error when trying to upload a new profile image.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Customer is not receiving order confirmation and billing emails.

title: Two-Factor Authentication Issue
description: User is not receiving OTP during login process.

title: Refund Not Processed
description: Customer requested a refund but has not received confirmation or funds.

title: Order Status Not Updating
description: Order tracking page is not showing the latest delivery status.

title: Cannot Change Password
description: User unable to change password from security settings.

title: Billing Address Mismatch Error
description: Customer receives billing address mismatch error during checkout.

title: Subscription Cancellation Issue
description: User unable to cancel subscription from account dashboard.
